name: pmu_real
_note: GOLDEN TEMPLATE for the REAL PMU (the exact user pins). The <...> placeholders are RESOLVER-FILLED: the GUI hands symbol PIN names (kept verbatim in each port's 'pin' field) and cadence/insitu/resolve.py turns them into the '<net:PIN>' slots below. <tb_lib>/<tb_cell>/<dut_lib>/<dut_cell>/<dut_inst>/<corner> come straight from the GUI. This file is the shape build_manifest(gui, netmap) emits; hand-edit only the placeholders. In-situ bias policy: no v_out 'iload' and no i_out 'dc' here because the user supplied none -- the TB's real loads/sources set the OP. (manifest.validate() will default i_out.dc=0.0 at load time purely for the read-side derivation; that is intentionally NOT written here.)
